title: Unbounded growth of errors list
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/metrics.py:36

## Description
The errors list grows without bound as record_error() is called. Unlike packet hashes (bounded by unique packets), repeated error conditions can generate many identical error messages, causing unbounded list growth.

## Failure Scenario
A node has a persistent configuration error that triggers record_error() on every RX attempt. Over a long simulation, millions of error strings accumulate, exhausting memory with redundant data.

## Category
safety
